QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_1

question.text: PFRDA was established on an interim basis in which year?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** PFRDA was established in 2003 on an interim basis to regulate and develop the pension sector. The PFRDA Act was later notified on February 1, 2014. **The Trap:** Candidates confuse 2003 (interim establishment) with 2004 (NPS launch for central govt) or 2013 (PFRDA Act passed). **Cross-Exam Context:** This is a foundational regulatory question. Timeline: 2003 interim PFRDA, Jan 1 2004 NPS launch, 2013 Act passed, Feb 1 2014 Act notified. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always clarify the difference between PFRDA interim establishment (2003) and the formal Act (2013/2014) when advising clients about NPS regulatory backing.
